settings.comment: Enable Temporal Reverser debug logging and any debug-only behavior tied to the mod.
Allow birch as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow oak as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow maple as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow pine as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow acacia as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow kapok as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow redwood as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow bald cypress as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow larch as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow ebony as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow walnut as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow purpleheart as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow aged wood as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow very aged wood as a valid wood output for restored wood-based items and blocks.
Allow raccoons to appear when the Temporal Reverser restores eligible clutter or spawn content.
Allow mice to appear when the Temporal Reverser restores eligible clutter or spawn content.
Allow moths to appear when the Temporal Reverser restores eligible clutter or spawn content.
